sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tuples (a Tuple(Int32, Int32), b Tuple(Boolean, Boolean)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO test_tuples VALUES (tuple(1, 2), tuple(true, false));
SELECT tupleConcat(a, b) AS combined FROM test_tuples;
UPDATE test_tuples SET a = tupleConcat(a, tuple(3, 4)) WHERE a = tuple(1, 2);
SELECT tupleConcat(tuple(5, 6), b) AS extended FROM test_tuples;
